ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PETITIONER PEREZ, VERONICA
FIRST APPEARANCE FEE PAID FILED BY RESPONDENT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MINUTES FOR JUN-09-2020 9:31 AM

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, JUNE-09-2020 HEARING HELD RE: PETITIONER VERONICA PEREZ'S MOTION FOR ORDER RELIEVING PETITIONER FROM PROVISIONS OF GOVERNMENT CODE SEC. 945.4. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING MAKING A MODIFICATION TO A SINGLE SENTENCE. THE COURT'S RULING IS AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER VERONICA PEREZ'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER RELIEVING HER FROM THE PROVISIONS OF GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 945.4 IS DENIED. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING). THE COURT SIGNS THE RESPONDENT'S PROPOSED ORDER MAKING A MODIFICATION TO A SINGLE SENTENCE. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA A. TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)

calendar.matters:
Petitioner Veronica Perez Motion - Notice Of Motion For Order Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Government Code Sec. 945.4. (Stipulated Continuance Request, Cont. From 4/14/20, Email Dated 5/18/20)
Off Calendar Jun-09-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. TARA J. MACOMBER, Esq. of Open Door Legal (Tel: 415-323-0946) appearing via CourtCall for Petitioner Veronica Perez;
Deputy Citty Atty. FREDERICK P. SHEINFIELD of the Office of the City Attorney (Tel: 415-554-3872) appearing via CourtCall for Respondent City and County of San Francisco

Hearing Re: Petitioner Veronica Perez's Motion for Order Relieving Petitioner from Provisions of Government Code Sec. 945.4.

The matter is argued and submitted by counsel for both sides.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling making a modification to a single sentence. The Court's ruling is as follows: Petitioner Veronica Perez's motion for an order relieving her from the provisions of Government Code section 945.4 is denied. (See Word minutes for complete ruling).

The Court signs the Respondent's proposed order making a modification to a single sentence.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
